source: umbrella-pq stability KAT — generated 2026-04-25 from libcrux-ml-dsa 0.0.9 ml_dsa_65::generate_key_pair; fixes deterministic seed→keypair для reproducibility. Note: ML-DSA-65 sign использует hedged randomness — signature не deterministic для fixed seed, vectors проверяют только keygen и verify acceptance.

vectors.note: 32-byte keygen randomness; 32-byte ASCII message 'Hello hybrid hybrid post-quantum'; 24-byte ASCII context 'umbrellax-hybrid context'. Test ассертит sign → verify roundtrip + bit-flip detection.
Single-byte message + empty context — boundary case для FIPS 204 sign.
